title: Teleport Doors
description: Adds teleporting doors, automatically paired by wood type and color for seamless travel.
body:
## 🚪 TeleportDoors

**TeleportDoors** is a Fabric-based Minecraft mod that adds special doors capable of teleporting players between two linked locations.

Doors are automatically paired using a combination of **wood type** and **color**, making teleportation intuitive, immersive, and fully persistent — without commands or manual configuration.

Perfect for builders, adventure maps, and survival worlds that need a clean, vanilla-friendly teleport solution.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🚪 **Teleporting Doors**  
  Walk through one door and instantly appear at its linked counterpart.

- 🌳 **Wood Type Based Linking**  
  Each door is tied to a specific wood type (oak, spruce, birch, etc.).

- 🎨 **Color-Coded Door Pairs**  
  Colors define unique teleport pairs within the same wood type.

- 🔗 **Automatic Door Pairing**  
  Exactly **one door pair** can exist per wood-type + color combination.

- 💾 **Persistent Door Registry**  
  Door links survive world reloads, restarts, and chunk unloads.

- 🧱 **Vanilla-Like Behavior**  
  Correct blockstates, hitboxes, opening, and closing behavior.

- ⚙️ **Fabric-Based & Lightweight**  
  No Forge, no extra dependencies beyond Fabric API.

---

## 🧠 How It Works

1. Craft and place the first teleport door  
   → The door is registered as *waiting*.
2. Place a second door with the same wood type and color  
   → Both doors are permanently linked.
3. Walk through either door  
   → You are teleported to its paired door.

If one door is broken, the link is released and the combination becomes available again.

---

## 🧪 Crafting Recipes

TeleportDoors are crafted using **custom recipes**.

Each recipe consists of:
- the selected **wood type**
- a **color dye**
- an **Ender Pearl in the center slot**

The **Ender Pearl** represents the teleportation magic and is **required for every TeleportDoor recipe**.

### 🔨 Example Crafting Recipe

> 🖼️ **Crafting Recipe Image (Placeholder)**  
> *(Ender Pearl must be placed in the center slot)*

![Crafting recipe for the teleport door (option 1)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/711446b62899d00614041dc19f64922630bfba51.png)

![Crafting recipe for the teleport door (option 2)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcadcdae77a16a122ce4521a3769afa62f5c375a.png)
---

### 🎨 Color Variants

Different dyes create different teleport pairs, even when using the same wood type.

---

> ⚠️ **Important**  
> Only **two doors per wood-type + color combination** can exist at the same time.  
> Additional crafting attempts for the same combination are intentionally blocked.

---

## ⚠️ Limitations

- Teleportation only works if both doors exist
- No cross-dimension teleportation yet (Overworld ↔ Nether)
- Door duplication is intentionally prevented

---

## 🔮 Planned Features

- 🌍 Cross-dimension teleportation
- ✨ Visual teleport effects (fade, particles)
- 🔑 Key or permission-based access
- 📜 Tooltip information for linked doors
- 🔧 Configurable behavior options

---

## 🧩 Dependencies

- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

---

## 👤 Author

**Jason Oltzen (JasonFight)** – Author and core developer
